# Rolly Calma

> Self-taught Python developer with a finance/accounting background (NetSuite, Excel), based in the Philippines. I build small, tested, and deployed tools end-to-end — AR/AP automation, website QA audits, and retrieval-augmented (RAG) demos — and I make each one available to try live. Open to remote junior Python / AI-automation roles and fixed-price project work.

## About

- Name: Rolly Calma (handle: Raven / Ghraven)
- Role: Python developer — AI automation and finance tooling
- Location: Philippines (remote, worldwide)
- Focus: turning repetitive finance/back-office and web-quality work into reliable, tested automation
- Contact: rolly.calma.0217@gmail.com

## Services

- [AR/AP Automation](https://rollycalma.com/arap/): Automates accounts receivable and payable — invoice-to-payment matching, AR aging reports, collection-email drafting, vendor-bill matching, and duplicate-bill detection. Works with CSV exports, Xero, and QuickBooks. Fixed-price pilots for small businesses and accounting firms.
- [Website QA & Launch Sprints (Webloom)](https://rollycalma.com/webloom/): Fixed-price website quality-assurance audits and pre-launch sprints. Finds and fixes SEO, accessibility, mobile, and broken-link issues that cost traffic and trust — delivered with a prioritized report in about 48 hours.

## Live projects

- [Website QA Auditor](https://qa-auditor.onrender.com/): Live Render demo that analyzes a web page for SEO, accessibility, and mobile issues and returns a letter-graded, client-ready report.
- [AR/AP Autopilot](https://github.com/Ghraven): Accounts-receivable and accounts-payable automation with invoice matching, aging reports, and Xero/QuickBooks connectors.
- [Mini-RAG](https://mini-rag-ju6l.onrender.com/): Lightweight retrieval-augmented question-answering demo with retrieval, eval, and guardrail proof.

## Case studies

- [Case Studies](https://rollycalma.com/case-studies/): Short public proof pages for the core portfolio work.
- [Website QA Auditor Case Study](https://rollycalma.com/case-studies/website-qa-auditor/): Problem, build, deployment proof, and next upgrade.
- [Mini-RAG Case Study](https://rollycalma.com/case-studies/mini-rag/): RAG fundamentals, grounding, and evaluation proof.
- [Agent Meeting Room Case Study](https://rollycalma.com/case-studies/agent-meeting-room/): Local multi-agent Flask workspace with presets, memory, streaming, and exports.
